target: 10. Final Ferry
Attention all island residents. Currently, a disaster of unknown cause has occurred, centered around Hitogashima Shrine.
Those who wish to evacuate to the mainland, please board the temporary ferry departing shortly.
Shin-chan, the ferry's already here!
Yeah, we made it. I hope Sou and the others can make it too, though.
I think there are other people hiding too, but... I wonder if they can make it here somehow.
Like, earlier at the school, it seemed like there was someone else besides us. There was a huge noise coming from the classroom, right?
If it was someone evacuating like us, maybe it would have been better if we ran here together.
If the power hadn't gone out, we could have gone to check it out, though.
Considering the possibility of being attacked by Shadows in the pitch dark, I couldn't make any careless moves.
Yeah, I know...
Come on, let's hurry up and board. Maybe Sou and Toki-chan are already inside.
Yeah!
Huh? It looks like there's no one inside the boat.
What should we do? Maybe we should go back to the boarding area and wait to see if Tokiko and the others come.
Shin-chan?
You don't need to do that. Just be a good boy and stay right here.
Huh...
Because this is where it ends.
What on earth are you talking--
